description: A plain candid color group photograph (no design overlay or on-image text) taken at a USCIS naturalization/citizenship ceremony. Four people pose smiling for the camera in an indoor ceremony room: from left, a woman in a white blouse and black pants holding a phone, a man in a white cap and white t-shirt, a teenage boy in a red-and-blue plaid/checked shirt holding a small handheld American flag and displaying his framed certificate of citizenship, and a young woman in a white top and black-and-white houndstooth skirt. Behind them are a U.S. flag on a pole, a potted plant, and a table draped with a blue DHS Department of Homeland Security tablecloth/banner. This is a routine family event snapshot of a new young citizen and his family, not a designed graphic or meme.
